mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_attach_file.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO attach_file ( file_id, member_id, target_type, target_id, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, mime_type, is_rep, sort_no, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{memberId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{orgFileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{mimeType}, #{isRep}, #{sortNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id, member_id, target_type, target_id, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, mime_type, is_rep, sort_no, reg_dt FROM attach_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT file_id, member_id, target_type, target_id, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, mime_type, is_rep, sort_no, reg_dt FROM attach_file WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_rep = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sort_no, file_id
